title: BHN Container Stats
description: Per-Docker-container CPU/memory/network from docker stats. 5-min cadence.

targets.rawSql: SELECT measured_at AS time, node_name || '/' || container_name AS metric, cpu_pct FROM container_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) ORDER BY 1
SELECT measured_at AS time, node_name || '/' || container_name AS metric, mem_pct FROM container_stats WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) ORDER BY 1

SELECT DISTINCT ON (node_name, container_name) node_name, container_name, image, cpu_pct, mem_used_mb, mem_limit_mb, mem_pct, pids, measured_at FROM container_stats ORDER BY node_name, container_name, measured_at DESC
